about.tagline: Prototype is a creative-driven hybrid structure, a one-stop shop, from ideas to execution. We are not just a production house, we are an agency, a design studio, and a digital factory all in one place. A place where brands can be more authentic, bold, and rise above the crowd.
about.sophieBio1: Sophie Goussin was born on the west coast of France. After a few years abroad, she attended a Parisian advertising school and started her career at Saatchi & Saatchi Paris. She then spent several years as a Business Director at Ogilvy London and Ogilvy Paris before becoming head of media production in the fashion industry.
about.sophieBio2: As a Creative Producer, Sophie leads projects for clients such as Hermès, Baccarat, Dior, Marc Jacobs, and many more.
about.fredBio1: Fred Bauer was born and raised in Paris. After studying at ESRA Paris, he began his career in video editing before switching to VFX, where he made a significant impact at Mac Guff Paris. He returned to directing a few years later, before focusing on TV branding and becoming an art director at Canal+ for nearly five years.
about.fredBio2: At annas-story, Fred leads a talented team of creatives across a range of projects, from art direction to postproduction.
